command:
printf 'Targets:
'; for p in scripts/security/verify-m015-runtime-security.sh scripts/security/m015-runtime/docker-compose.yml scripts/security/m015-runtime/postgres-init/001-roles.sh scripts/security/m015-runtime/README.md .gitignore backend-hormonia/docker-compose.yml backend-hormonia/Dockerfile backend-hormonia/app/main.py; do if [ -e "$p" ]; then printf 'EXISTS %s
' "$p"; else printf 'MISSING %s
' "$p"; fi; done
printf '
Top-level scripts/security:
'; find scripts/security -maxdepth 3 -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | head -80
printf '
Backend compose-adjacent files:
'; find backend-hormonia -maxdepth 2 \( -name 'docker-compose*.yml' -o -name 'Dockerfile*' -o -name 'alembic.ini' -o -name '.env*' \) -type f | sort
